We use cookies to help you navigate efficiently and perform certain functions. You will find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below.

The cookies that are categorized as "Necessary" are stored on your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the site. ... Show more

NecessaryAlways Active

Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.

Functional

Functional cookies help perform certain functionalities like sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collecting feedback, and other third-party features.

Analytics

Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information on metrics such as the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.

Performance

Performance cookies are used to understand and analyze the key performance indexes of the website which helps in delivering a better user experience for the visitors.

Advertisement

Advertisement cookies are used to provide visitors with customized advertisements based on the pages you visited previously and to analyze the effectiveness of the ad campaigns.

Uncategorized

Other uncategorized cookies are those that are being analyzed and have not been classified into a category as yet.

## Welcome to the first-ever NoMad Residences, now at home in Miami’s vibrant Wynwood

This is a great investment opportunity with short term rentals capabilities like no other in the area.

### Studios, and Two Bedroom Configurations

## The Residences

• Featuring 9 stories and 329 Fully Furnished Luxury Residences•Short term rentals for AirBnB•Pricing starting in the USD 500,000•Units ranging in size from 4646 square feet to 931 square feet.•18,452 square feet of ground floor commercial space, including Casa Tua•193 parking spaces on-site in an enclosed and lined garage

Click the photos for more details

### Spectacular Common Areas and amenities

## Luxury Amenities & services

• Globally-acclaimed NoMad curation and design• Rooftop NoMad Restaurant and Bar with separate elevator• Inspired, impeccable landscaping• 24 hour concierge and building security• 24/7 valet parking and in-building garage• Grilling area and outdoor cinema• Extensive library and co-working spaces• Bicycle storage• In-residence cuisine delivered on demand• Dedicated check-in services• Privately controlled elevator access• Smart climate control• Private storage• Pet-friendly

## THE LOCATION

Building Address:

[2700 NW 2nd Ave, Miami, FL 33127](https://maps.app.goo.gl/oBPrTFuKepVX22717)

\- Brickell: 10 minutes’ drive\- Downtown Miami: 7 minutes’ drive\- Key Biscayne: 15 minutes’ drive\- Miami Beaches: 15 minutes’ drive\- Aventura: 20 minutes’ drive\- Miami Airport: 15 minutes’ drive

### LATest NEWS

## Nomad Wynwood continues its vertical development

Wynwood Miami's most popular short-term rental project is well underway and almost sold out, although there are still some great opportunities available for sale…Updated on: 07/24/2024

![](https://nomadwynwood.miami/assets/images/image04.jpg?v=8dc243d4)

![](https://nomadwynwood.miami/assets/images/image13.jpg?v=8dc243d4)

## The Related group

The Related group’s team develops a wide range of developments, from luxury high-rise condominiums to more affordable ones; their main focus is creating culture, design and lifestyle-infused properties continues to revitalize urban neighborhoods. They have been working for 4 decades. Some of their prestigious investments include [Hyde Beach House](https://miamiresidential.com/hydebeachhouse/), [50 Biscayne](https://miamiresidential.com/50biscayne), [Brickell Heights](https://miamiresidential.com/brickellheightseast/), [Icon Brickell](https://miamiresidential.com/iconbrickell), [SLS Lux](https://miamiresidential.com/slslux/), [Baccarat Residences](https://miamiresidential.com/baccaratresidences/), [The Crosby](https://miamiresidential.com/thecrosby) and many others in South Florida.

## ARQUITECTONICA

Arquitectonica is a globally renowned architectural firm known for its bold, modern designs and innovative use of materials. Notable buildings by Arquitectonica include the Atlantis Condominium in Miami, famous for its distinctive cutout and red spiral staircase, and Brickell City Centre, a mixed-use development that has transformed Miami's financial district with luxury residences, office spaces, and a premium shopping center. Another significant project is the AmericanAirlines Arena, home to the Miami Heat, which features a sleek, contemporary design. Arquitectonica has also designed Icon Brickell, a high-end residential complex known for its striking architecture and upscale amenities. Their work spans across the globe, consistently pushing the boundaries of architecture and urban design.

![](https://nomadwynwood.miami/assets/images/image10.jpg?v=8dc243d4)

![](https://nomadwynwood.miami/assets/images/image18.jpg?v=8dc243d4)

## INTERIOR DESIGN   DESIGN AGENCY

Design Agency is a leading interior design firm renowned for its innovative and stylish approach to transforming spaces. With a diverse portfolio that spans residential, commercial, and hospitality projects, Design Agency combines creativity with functionality to deliver bespoke interiors that reflect their clients' unique visions. Their team of experienced designers and architects work collaboratively to craft environments that are not only aesthetically stunning but also highly functional and sustainable. Committed to excellence and attention to detail, Design Agency continues to set new standards in the world of interior design, making them a go-to choice for discerning clients seeking extraordinary results.

## Why Invest in Miami?

Investing in Miami offers numerous benefits, making it a prime real estate destination. Miami's strategic global location ensures robust economic growth and a thriving job market. The city attracts millions of tourists yearly, driving high demand for rental properties. Its real estate market boasts strong property appreciation and diverse investment opportunities. Miami offers a rich cultural scene, world-class dining, shopping, and entertainment, alongside beautiful beaches and a warm climate. The favorable tax climate, with no state income tax, further enhances its appeal. Excellent transportation infrastructure, including Miami International Airport and PortMiami, ensures seamless connectivity. With vibrant communities and continuous development, Miami promises immediate returns and long-term growth, making it an ideal investment choice.

![](https://nomadwynwood.miami/assets/images/image17.jpg?v=8dc243d4)

![](https://nomadwynwood.miami/assets/images/image02.jpg?v=8dc243d4)
